news.headline: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals and Eyenovia starting co-promotion activities; Eyenovia's ten-person field salesforce to promote NovaBay products. (includes NYSE: NBY, NASDAQ: EYEN)
news.summary: NovaBay® Pharmaceuticals, Inc. located in Emeryville, California and Eyenovia, Inc. based in New York have initiated operations under a co-promotion agreement. NovaBay, a company specializing in eyecare products, trades on NYSE American under NBY stock symbol, while Eyenovia, a commercial ophthalmic company with two FDA-approved products and a late-stage asset in pediatric progressive myopia, is listed on NASDAQ as EYEN. As per the agreement, Eyenovia will utilize its ten-person field salesforce to promote the collaboration between the two companies.

news.headline: Analysis: Bitcoin & Ethereum vs top tech stocks from 2019-2024: Exploring market cap growth & trends. Check it out! (Read More)
news.summary: Dive into the market capitalization trends of Bitcoin and Ethereum compared to the top seven tech stocks from 2019 to 2024. Analyze the growth rates, key trends, and performance metrics of these cryptocurrencies against giants like Apple, Amazon, and Google during this period. Discover how the market cap of Bitcoin and Ethereum fluctuated in relation to these tech industry leaders and gain insights into their comparative performance over the five-year span.

news.headline: Eve Air Mobility secures $94M in new equity funding for eVTOL development, bolstering position for future growth.
news.summary: Eve Air, based in Melbourne, Fla., has recently secured new capital financing that includes an equity injection from major strategic industrial companies and diverse investors. The net proceeds from this funding, combined with the company's existing cash reserves and long-term credit lines, have enhanced its financial position for upcoming endeavors. This development took place on July 1, 2024.

news.headline: Ameresco secures $100M debt financing from Nuveen, enhancing balance sheet stability and enabling business growth.
news.summary: Ameresco, a top cleantech integrator in energy efficiency and renewable energy, headquartered in Framingham, Mass., has recently finalized an important financial deal. The company has secured a $100 million second lien debt financing from Nuveen Energy Infrastructure Credit. This move highlights Ameresco's dedication to expanding its operations and ensuring financial stability. Collaboration with Nuveen provides advantageous terms and opportunities for growth. The partnership is set to enhance Ameresco's position in the market and support its future endeavors.

news.headline: Dutch Bros introduces new summer drinks, including Cookie Dough Freeze, Sherbet Rebel, and Tropical Frosted Lemonade at 900+ locations.
news.summary: Stay cool this summer in Grants Pass, Oregon with Dutch Bros' refreshing new beverages! The latest menu features nostalgic '90s flavors including the Cookie Dough Freeze, Sherbet Rebel, and Tropical Frosted Lemonade. These delicious drinks can be enjoyed at any of the 900+ Dutch Bros locations.

news.headline: Albemarle Corp (NYSE: ALB) to report Q2 2024 earnings on July 31, 2024, after NYSE close. Based in Charlotte, NC.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Albemarle Corporation, a renowned provider of essential elements for various industries, revealed plans to announce its second-quarter 2024 earnings post the NYSE’s closure on Wednesday, July. Albemarle Corporation is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALB and is recognized worldwide for its contributions to mobility, energy, connectivity, and health sectors. This upcoming disclosure of financial results is anticipated to provide crucial insights into the company’s performance during this period, impacting its stakeholders and the market in general.

news.headline: Sitio Royalties Corp (NYSE: STR) to announce Q2 2024 results on August 7, 2024, after market close. Conference call on August 8 at 8:30 am Eastern. Dial 1-833-470-1428 (US) or 1-404-9.
news.summary: Sitio Royalties Corp. (NYSE: STR) revealed plans to disclose its performance data for the second quarter of 2024 on August 7, 2024, following the NYSE's trading hours. In a conference call scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern on August 8, 2024, Sitio will delve into the details of their operational and financial outcomes for Q2 2024. Interested parties can join the discussion by calling 1-833-470-1428 in the U.S., or 1-404-9XXX-XXXX internationally.

news.headline: Brown & Brown, Inc. will release Q2 earnings on July 22, followed by an investor update call on July 23 at 8:00 am EDT.
news.summary: In Daytona Beach, Florida, Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE: BRO) has revealed plans to report its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on July 22, 2024, after the market closes. The company's president and CEO, J. Powell Brown, along with the executive VP and CFO, R. Andrew Watts, will host an investor update conference call on July 23, 2024. The call will discuss Brown & Brown's performance during the second quarter of 2024. The event is scheduled to be broadcast live on the company's official website at 8:00 a.m. EDT. To tune in, visit www.bbinsurance.com, navigate to "Investor Relations," and click on "Calendar of Events."

news.headline: KKR invests in Baby Memorial Hospital, acquiring a majority stake in the Indian multi-specialty chain. Financial details undisclosed.
news.summary: KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) has entered into definitive agreements with Baby Memorial Hospital, a regional multi-specialty hospital chain in India, for the acquisition of a majority stake by KKR-managed funds. The financial specifics of the deal have not been disclosed. Akshay Tanna, Partner and Head of India Private Equity at KKR, emphasized that the investment in BMH aligns with their ongoing focus on the healthcare sector in India. The partnership with Dr. K G Alexander and family aims to support BMH in expanding its hospital network and enhancing medical infrastructure to improve healthcare services.

news.headline: German and US govts transfer $150M in Bitcoin and Ethereum, attracting market interest.
news.summary: Both the German and U.S. governments have recently made strategic maneuvers involving substantial transfers of Bitcoin and Ethereum, which have captured the attention of the market.

news.headline: Philippines integrates USDT for social security payments in state program benefiting workers in various sectors.
news.summary: The Social Security System is a government-operated social insurance initiative providing coverage to workers in various sectors, including official, informal, and private employment. With a significant number of individuals benefiting from this program, it plays a crucial role in safeguarding the financial well-being of many workers across different industries.

news.headline: Military operation initiated in Black Sea to boost Ukraine exports.
Babcock & Wilcox sells Denmark-based subsidiary for $87 million to Hitachi Zosen Inova AG.
news.summary: Akron, Ohio - B&W has recently finalized the sale of its Babcock & Wilcox Renewable Service A/S subsidiary in Denmark to Hitachi Zosen Inova AG located in Zurich, Switzerland. The acquisition was valued at $87 million.

news.headline: Matador Resources to release Q2 2024 results on July 23, 2024 after trading with a conference call scheduled on July 24 at 10:00 am CT.
news.summary: Matador Resources Company (NYSE: MTDR) disclosed plans to unveil its second quarter 2024 operational and financial outcomes on Tuesday, July 23, 2024, post-market closing. The management intends to conduct a live conference call the subsequent day, July 24, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time to discuss the financial results and operational highlights of the second quarter. For those interested, the live conference call can be accessed via phone or through a dedicated link.

news.headline: Kanvas Biosciences receives $12.5M, totaling $29.5M, for microbiome-based immuno-oncology drugs; introduces spatial biology platform.
news.summary: Having secured $29.5 million in funding, a company has created the foremost spatial biology platform globally. This innovative technology aims to revolutionize drug development, clinical diagnostics, agriculture, and food safety. The proprietary mapping technology will initially focus on leveraging the...

news.headline: Middle-market private equity firm Lee Equity Partners closes oversubscribed Fund IV at $1.3 billion.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Lee Equity Partners, LLC revealed the successful closing of Lee Equity Partners Fund IV, L.P. Despite being oversubscribed, the fund managed to secure a significant amount for investment purposes. This middle-market private equity firm's Fund IV, along with its associated funds became a thriving venture that attracted substantial investments from various sources.

news.headline: Hydrogen storage market to hit $7.7B by 2028 with 7.6% CAGR from 2023 driven by materials and tech advances.
news.summary: A recent research study by BCC reveals a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.6% in the Hydrogen Storage Market between 2023 and 2028. This growth is primarily attributed to advancements in materials and technologies. The report emphasizes the role of the green energy transition in pushing forward global decarbonization initiatives, particularly within challenging-to-reduce sectors. The study also highlights the importance of sustainable energy solutions in addressing climate concerns.

news.headline: SpringWorks Therapeutics submits NDA to FDA for Mirdametinib for NF1-PN treatment in children and adults, July 01, 2024.
news.summary: SpringWorks Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company based in Stamford, Connecticut, has successfully submitted a New Drug Application (NDA) to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for mirdametinib, an MEK inhibitor. This submission is intended for the treatment of neurofibromatosis type 1-associated plexiform neurofibromas (NF1-PN) in both pediatric and adult patients. The company, listed on Nasdaq as SWTX, specializes in severe rare diseases and cancer therapies. This milestone marks a significant step forward in providing potential treatment options for patients with this rare disease.

news.headline: Hut 8 secures $150M investment from Coatue Management; strengthens position in Bitcoin mining.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Hut 8 Corp. (Nasdaq | TSX: HUT), a prominent energy infrastructure operator and Bitcoin miner in North America, successfully completed a $150 million convertible note investment from Coatue Management, L.L.C. This investment marks a significant step for Hut 8 in bolstering its operations and expansion efforts.

news.headline: Olin Corporation lodges anti-dumping complaint with EU against four countries, with Westlake Corp and Spolchemie.
news.summary: In Clayton, Missouri on July 1, 2024, Olin Corporation (NYSE: OLN), along with Westlake Corporation (NYSE: WLK) and Spolchemie, part of the Ad Hoc Coalition of Epoxy Resin Producers, shared news that the European Commission has started an anti-dumping investigation. This Coalition involves key companies in the industry, and the development impacts the market significantly.

news.headline: Michael Dell shows support for Bitcoin, sparking interest. $1000 invested in BTC 2 years ago vs Dell Technologies.
news.summary: CEO of Dell Technologies Inc., Michael Dell, is gaining attention in cryptocurrency circles for his interest in Bitcoin. He recently reposted a pro-Bitcoin comment from Michael Saylor and conducted a poll on social media asking followers about the most important thing, with Bitcoin receiving the highest number of votes at 43%, surpassing options like AI. This has sparked discussions in the cryptocurrency community about Dell's growing affinity for Bitcoin.

news.headline: France's election sees Macron and left-wing challengers uniting against far-right threat. #Bloomberg #FranceElection
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 14.7%. This data reflects the impact of the ongoing pandemic, which has led to millions of job losses across various industries. The report also highlighted a significant decrease in GDP, with the economy shrinking by 4.8% in the last quarter. The government has announced a stimulus package of $2 trillion to address the economic challenges faced by businesses and individuals. Additionally, it was noted that the stock market has experienced unprecedented volatility, with the S&P 500 index dropping by 12% in the last month. Experts predict a slow recovery for the economy as businesses work towards resuming operations amidst the lingering uncertainty.

news.headline: ROKiT Racing Star documentary series follows search for young talent in 'sim to circuit' comp with prizes of fully-funded drives in British F4 championship.
news.summary: In London, the Chairman of ROKiT Industries, Jonathan Kendrick and the late Bob Fernley spearheaded the creation of the ROKiT Racing Star documentary series. This series showcases the thrilling journey of discovering fresh young driving talents through a groundbreaking 'sim to circuit' contest. Winners of this competition are awarded fully-funded drives in the British Formula 4 championship. Jonathan Kendrick expressed, "We launched RO" in this venture.

news.headline: Tech sector & industry performance data on Bloomberg with key figures; stay updated on latest trends.
Ethereum continues outflows, Bitcoin sentiment shows signs of reversal as digital asset products see third week of outflows.
news.summary: Investment products related to digital assets recorded a third straight week of withdrawals, with Ethereum seeing notable outflows and a potential change in sentiment towards Bitcoin.

news.headline: Noah Holdings Limited announces changes to its Board of Directors in Shanghai on July 1, 2024. (Characters: 95)
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Shanghai, Noah Holdings Limited (NYSE: NOAH and HKEX: 6686), a prominent wealth management service provider, announced its latest services. The company specializes in offering comprehensive advisory services for global investment and asset allocation. Noah is known for being a pioneer in the industry and is a leader in providing one-stop solutions for wealth management.

news.headline: Karmanos, McLaren, Detroit Tigers host event at Comerica Park to promote prostate health and awareness, honoring survivors.
news.summary: Comerica Park is hosting a special event on July 1, 2024, to promote prostate health and cancer awareness, as well as celebrate survivors of prostate cancer and honor those who have bravely fought the disease. The event expects to draw in hundreds of prostate cancer survivors to the stadium.

news.headline: Landsbankinn to auction inflation-linked series LBANK CBI 30 covered bonds on July 2 at 15:00.
news.summary: Landsbankinn is set to auction covered bonds on July 2nd at 15:00. The auction will feature the sale of an inflation-linked series, LBANK CBI 30.

news.headline: Healthcare Trust, Inc. plans to internalize management, rebrand as National Healthcare Properties, potential listing on national exchange.
news.summary: Healthcare Trust, Inc. (Nasdaq: HTIA / HTIBP) revealed plans to potentially list its common stock on a national securities exchange. The company notified Healthcare Trust Advisors, LLC, its external advisor, about its intention to internalize management functions in a move termed "Internalization." This transition to self-management is expected to be finalized by the fourth quarter.

news.headline: Ethereum sees gains as $20M shorts and $1.9M long contracts get liquidated in 24 hours, per Coinglass data.
news.summary: In the last 24 hours, approximately $20 million in Ethereum short contracts and $1.9 million in long contracts faced liquidation, as per data from Coinglass.

news.headline: PenFed Credit Union promotes Shree Reddy to Chief Information Officer. Nation's second largest federal credit union.
news.summary: Experienced leader Shree Reddy has been promoted to the position of Chief Information Officer and Executive Vice President at PenFed Credit Union, located in Tyson, Virginia. This announcement was made on July 1, 2024. PenFed Credit Union is recognized as the second largest federal credit union in the United States. Reddy brings with her decades of experience to this new role within the organization.

news.headline: BSV Blockchain announces upcoming Chronicle update in 2024 to align with Bitcoin whitepaper, enhance scalability.
news.summary: In Zug, Switzerland, the BSV Blockchain has revealed plans to introduce the Chronicle update in late 2024. This update aims to bring the BSV blockchain closer to the principles outlined in the original Bitcoin white paper. One of the key features of the update is its ability to dynamically scale, allowing for increased efficiency and scalability. The launch of this update signifies a significant milestone for BSV Blockchain as it continues to evolve and adapt to meet the demands of the blockchain industry.

news.headline: IHS Holding Limited (NYSE: IHS) announced successful results of 2024 Annual Meeting with all proposals adopted.
news.summary: In London, IHS Holding Limited, a major player in shared communications infrastructure worldwide with a large tower count, disclosed the outcomes of its 2024 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on June 28, 2024. All proposals presented to shareholders during the meeting, including the re-election of directors Frank Dangeard, Phuthuma Nhleko, Mallam Bashir El-Rufai, were approved. IHS Towers, under the NYSE symbol IHS, stands out as a leading independent owner, operator, and developer in the industry.

news.headline: 450 students and professionals gather in Monaco for 11th Monaco Energy Boat Challenge to advance sustainable yachting.
news.summary: In Monaco, the Yacht Club de Monaco, led by President HSH Prince Albert II, is hosting the 11th Monaco Energy Boat Challenge from July 1-6 at YCM Marina. This event highlights youth, innovation, and the future of yachting, serving as a platform for young engineers and industry experts to explore alternative propulsion systems and hull designs. The challenge fosters innovation in marine technology and is open to the public, showcasing cutting-edge developments in the field.

news.headline: Global Net Lease, Inc. declares $0.275 per share common stock dividend, payable July 16, 2024 to shareholders of record on July 11, 2024.
news.summary: Global Net Lease, Inc. (GNL) revealed a dividend payout of $0.275 per common stock, set to be distributed on July 16, 2024, to stockholders recorded as of July 11, 2024. The Company operates under the tickers NYSE: GNL, GNL PRA, GNL PRB, GNL PRD, and GNL PRE. This announcement was made on July 1, 2024.

news.headline: BlackRock acquires Preqin for $3.2 billion to enhance Aladdin platform with private markets data; Preqin expected to generate ~$240 million by 2024.
news.summary: Investment giant BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE:BLK) is set to buy Preqin, a private markets data solutions provider, for a hefty £2.55 billion ($3.2 billion) in cash. This move by BlackRock aims to bolster its investment technology by incorporating Preqin's data business, stepping into the burgeoning private markets data sector. Preqin boasts of more than 20 years of experience, tracking 190,000 funds, 60,000 fund managers, and 30,000 private markets investors, with a user base exceeding 200,000. The company anticipates generating around $240 million in revenue by 2024, showcasing a steady 20% yearly growth over the last three years. BlackRock's Aladdin platform, utilized by over 1,000 clients, will merge Preqin with eFront to streamline data operations. This strategic acquisition reflects BlackRock's commitment to expanding its technological capabilities in the investment sector.

news.headline: Global self-service kiosk market set to grow by USD 10.67 billion from 2024-2028, with estimated CAGR of 14.17%.
news.summary: In New York on July 1, 2024, reports indicate that the global self-service kiosk market is projected to increase by USD 10.67 billion between 2024-2028, as suggested by Technavio. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.17% throughout the forecast period. This growth is linked to various factors impacting the industry...

news.headline: Inseego in San Diego announces debt reduction and restructuring of convertible notes due 2025.
news.summary: In San Diego, Inseego has revealed plans for debt reduction and restructuring transactions involving Convertible Notes that are set to mature in 2025. This move aims to alleviate financial burdens and enhance the company's financial stability. The restructuring covers a significant amount of debt, totaling in the millions. The company's decision reflects a strategic effort to improve its financial standing and navigate economic challenges effectively.

news.headline: Iran's reformist candidate faces challenge in runoff election.
Grifols projects $1 billion in US sales of Yimmugo® over 7 years after FDA approval for PID treatment.
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain, on July 01, 2024, a major player in plasma-derived medicines, Grifols, disclosed that its subsidiary, Biotest, anticipates generating roughly $1 billion in revenue from the sales of its intravenous immunoglobulin (Ig) Yimmugo® in the United States over the upcoming seven years. This optimistic projection follows the recent approval from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to utilize the product for treating primary immunodeficiencies (PID). Grifols is identified on the Madrid Stock Exchange as MCE:GRF and MCE:GRF.P, and also on NASDAQ as GRFS.

news.headline: Duckhorn Portfolio (NYSE: NAPA) partners with Johnson Brothers for enhanced distribution agreements in the US.
news.summary: In St. Helena, California, The Duckhorn Portfolio, Inc. (NYSE: NAPA) revealed signed expanded distribution contracts with Johnson Brothers. This move marks the second phase of a strategic assessment of its wholesale distribution network in the United States. The goal is to boost the Company's sales by enhancing focus and investment in wholesale. No specifics about the increased distribution were provided.

news.headline: BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics to give mid-year update on NurOwn program via a conference call and webcast on July 8 at 8:00am ET.
news.summary: BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics Inc., a prominent developer of adult stem cell therapeutics for neurodegenerative diseases, will host a conference call and webcast on Monday, July 8, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This announcement was made on July 1, 2024, in New York. The company's stock trades on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BCLI.

news.headline: Arbe chosen by top OEM to develop imaging radar for production. Preparation for serial production starts. Nasdaq: ARBE, TASE: ARBE.
news.summary: Arbe Robotics Ltd., a prominent player in Perception Radar technology, revealed on July 1, 2024, that they are set to kick off preparations for serial production following an announcement from a major global OEM. The company, listed under Nasdaq as ARBE and TASE as ARBE, is gearing up for this significant move which can potentially have a far-reaching impact on their operations. This development comes as part of the company's strategy to expand its market presence and capitalize on emerging opportunities in their industry.

news.headline: i-5O partners with Cohere in AI manufacturing solutions; aims to enhance efficiency and optimize processes.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Miami, a renowned provider of AI-driven solutions for enhancing manufacturing processes, i-5O, announced a significant collaboration with Cohere, a leading company specializing in AI language models (LLMs), through Cohere's Startup Program. This partnership will empower i-5O by leveraging Cohere's expertise in LLMs.

news.headline: Aleph Group acquires Entravision's digital advertising business; continues connecting platforms with advertisers.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Miami, Aleph Group, a prominent company specializing in connecting top digital media platforms with advertisers and consumers in emerging markets, revealed the successful finalization of its purchase of Entravision Global Partners (EGP). This acquisition marks a significant move for Aleph Group in expanding its reach and services within the digital media landscape.

news.headline: Ademi LLP is investigating Spirit AeroSystems (NYSE: SPR) for potential breaches of fiduciary duty in its deal with Boeing.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Ademi LLP announced they are looking into Spirit (NYSE: SPR) for potential breaches of fiduciary duty and legal violations regarding their deal with Boeing. Individuals interested in participating in the investigation can find more information by clicking the link below.

news.headline: MHUA announces $3 million share repurchase program in China, a leading manufacturer of medical devices.
news.summary: In Yangzhou, China, on July 1, 2024, Meihua International Medical Technologies Co., Ltd. (MHUA), a leading manufacturer of Class I, II, and III disposable medical devices with presence on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MHUA, shared an update. This company operates through its subsidiaries in China and is recognized for its quality products in the medical field.

news.headline: KBR's K-GreeN® technology chosen by OCIOR Energy for green ammonia plant in India, the 10th global installation.
news.summary: In Houston on July 1, 2024, KBR revealed that OCIOR Energy has chosen its K-GreeN® green ammonia technology for their plant in Gopalpur, India. This marks the 10th global installation of a KBR-licensed green ammonia plant and represents the first of its kind in the region of Odisha.

news.headline: Togetherwork receives investment from Park Square Capital and GI Partners for growth. Provider of software and payments solutions.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Park Square Capital has partnered with GI Partners to support a prominent integrated software and payments platform for further expansion. Togetherwork, a top supplier of essential integrated software and payment services to organizations, will benefit from this collaboration. This partnership aims to propel the next phase of growth for the company.

news.headline: Krispy Kreme offers freebies to Rewards members in July: free doughnut every Tuesday and free iced coffee every Friday with any purchase at participating shops. Celebrating FREEdom.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Krispy Kreme® has introduced a special promotion for its Rewards members in July. Customers can enjoy a free doughnut every Tuesday and a complimentary iced coffee every Friday with any purchase made at participating Krispy Kreme shops. The offer starts on July 2nd, where Rewards members can choose any doughnut from the new Star Spangled Sweetness Collection, featuring three patriotic treats for Independence Day celebrations. This promotion is available for the entire month of July.
